sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE THGQMGCR ( CODCR INT NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_THGQMGCR PRIMARY KEY (CODCR) )
sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE THGQMGCR ( CODCR NUMBER(10) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_THGQMGCR PRIMARY KEY (CODCR) )

sql.descricao: Adicionar campo CODRNC na tabela THGQMGCR
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGCR ADD CODRNC INT

sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGCR ADD MAO_OBRA VARCHAR(4000)

sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGCR ADD METODO VARCHAR(4000)

sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGCR ADD MAQUINA VARCHAR(4000)

sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGCR ADD MEDIDA VARCHAR(4000)

sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE THGQMGCR ADD MATERIAL VARCHAR(4000)
